scope: Gateway /api/v1/instances kind=sandbox through kubernetes_rest workload provider and Kata RuntimeClass

sandbox.guest_log_excerpt: Linux sandbox-sandbox-kata-live-1783937234-bb2610ab-7bb6557d7d-6m27z 6.18.35 #1 SMP Mon Jun 15 12:55:58 UTC 2026 x86_64 GNU/Linux

boundaries: This validates a live sandbox create path through the existing workload provider orchestration; it does not declare full platform production ready.
The stable ANI RuntimeClass entrypoint is sandbox-kata; additional kata-* RuntimeClasses are Helm chart variants and not selected by ANI.
API DELETE returned 404 in this smoke run, so Kubernetes resource cleanup used kubectl for the temporary smoke Deployment.
